title: Israel strikes Lebanon after Hezbollah rocket fire as Iran conflict widens
summary_full: Lebanese officials say 52 people were killed by Israeli strikes, while there are no reports of casualties in Israel.
summary_public: Lebanese officials say 52 people were killed by Israeli strikes, while there are no reports of casualties in Israel.
